nodes.label: Alembic Migrations via Advanced Alchemy
nodes.rationale: create_all never alters existing tables, so schema changes silently fail on populated databases; versioned reviewable migrations are required for production. Reuse Advanced Alchemy's Alembic integration rather than wiring raw Alembic.

nodes.label: create_all gating (dev/test only)
nodes.rationale: Keep create_all for dev/test speed, disable in production where Alembic is the only schema path; gated by ENVIRONMENT.
